categories.title: I/O & Types
categories.doc: I/O and type-name builtins: print, str, type, assert, assert_eq.

categories.title: Math
categories.doc: Basic math, trig, and numeric conversion: abs, sqrt, floor, ceil, round, float, int, random, min, max, sin/cos/tan, atan2, pi.

categories.title: Creative-Coding Math
categories.doc: Creative-coding math + extended randomness: clamp, lerp, map_range, distance, mag, pow, sign, fract, smoothstep, radians, degrees, exp, log, random_int, choose.

categories.title: Color
categories.doc: Color builtins: hsv, hsl, color_lerp. All return RGB records `{r, g, b}` with 0..255 integer channels, matching the shape produced by color literals like `#ff8800`.

categories.title: Vectors (2D)
categories.doc: 2D vector builtins: vec2, normalize, dot, limit.

categories.title: Collections
categories.doc: List and record manipulation: range, len, push, append, pop, keys, values, contains, sort, reverse, join, split, enumerate, zip, slice, flat.

categories.title: Higher-Order Functions
categories.doc: List transforms that take a function: map, filter, reduce, forEach.

categories.title: Automatic Differentiation
categories.doc: Automatic differentiation (dual numbers): dual, value_of, deriv_of.

categories.title: Output & Symbols
categories.doc: Symbol and buffered-output builtins.  `symbol(name)` interns a name into a `Value::Symbol`, the binding key shared with the embedding host. `push_output(sym, value)` appends a value into the host-visible buffer bound to that symbol — the script-side counterpart to `Env::take_output_buffer`. Native host functions (e.g. draw commands) use the same channel via `PetalCxt::push_output`/`emit`.

categories.title: Async & Query Values
categories.doc: Test-only pending-resource builtins: `__pending`, `__resolve`, `__reject`.  These deterministically drive the resource table (no real I/O) so the pending-value semantics can be exercised in tests. Names are `__`-prefixed to read as internal. See docs/dev/pending-values-plan.md (roadmap step 1) — real fetchers arrive with `petal-query`.

categories.title: Drawing
categories.doc: Canvas drawing commands. Colors are r, g, b integer channels 0–255; the origin is the top-left.

categories.title: Input & Timing
categories.doc: Read the mouse, keyboard, clock, and canvas size each frame.
